++[Transmisión] Athletic Club vs Barcelona En Vivo Gratis Transmisión 7 Marzo 2026 Hoy

PUH-BrianMartell Theorem 87 (Numerical Construction of the Coxeter-Plane Projection of the 240 E₈ Roots Revealing 8 Rings × 30-Fold Symmetry in PUH v61) The 240 roots of the E₈ root lattice are generated from the two explicit coordinate classes. The Coxeter element C is formed as the product of the eight simple reflections. Its eigenvector for eigenvalue exp(2πi/30) supplies the two real basis vectors that span the Coxeter plane. Orthogonal projection of every root onto this plane yields eight concentric rings of exactly 30 roots each, invariant under 30-fold rotation and the full Weyl group.
